things.name: Okavango Delta Safari
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage inland delta - mokoro canoe through papyrus channels with lions and leopards

things.name: Chobe National Park
things.description: Africa's highest concentration of elephants - 130,000 in the Chobe River flood plain

things.name: National Museum of Botswana
things.description: San Bushman culture, wildlife dioramas and contemporary Botswana art

things.name: Mokolodi Nature Reserve
things.description: Rhino and cheetah conservation area 12km from Gaborone

things.name: Kalahari Desert Safari
things.description: Black-maned Kalahari lions, gemsbok and meerkats in the red dune wilderness

things.name: Main Mall
things.description: Gaborone's central pedestrianised mall with the Independence Arch

things.name: Central Kalahari Game Reserve
things.description: Botswana's largest reserve - the world's second largest nature reserve

things.name: Khama Rhino Sanctuary
things.description: Community rhino sanctuary 3 hours from Gaborone with white and black rhino

things.name: Gaborone Game Reserve
things.description: Urban game reserve within the city with zebra, springbok and giraffe

things.name: Seswaa Pounded Meat
things.description: Botswana's national dish - slow-cooked beef pounded with a wooden stick and served with ugali
